name: io.github.roboticforce/remembrallmcp
title: RemembrallMCP
description: Whole-codebase knowledge for AI coding agents. A field-aware code graph (functions, classes, methods, fields, and references across 8 languages) plus persistent memory, built on Rust, Postgres + pgvector, exposed over MCP.

environmentVariables.description: PostgreSQL connection string with pgvector extension
